overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through a rainy Night City at night. The vehicle travels from industrial warehouse districts through commercial areas with bright neon billboards, along coastal boulevards with palm trees, and under elevated highways. Heavy rain creates reflective wet roads and atmospheric haze throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse corridor with chain link fencing

agents.ego_description: driving forward through industrial warehouse district with chain link fences lining both sides of the road

notable_agents.action: vehicle traveling in same direction ahead on the wet road

entered.detail: tall metal chain link fencing running along the left side of the industrial road
large industrial warehouse structures with metal siding in the background
pedestrian or utility bridge crossing over the road ahead
red and white striped barriers along the right edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person driving view through an industrial warehouse district at night in heavy rain. Chain link fences line both sides of the narrow asphalt road, with large industrial buildings visible in the distance. The vehicle follows another car ahead, passing under an overhead walkway bridge while rain streaks across the windshield.

events.description: exiting industrial warehouse area into commercial district with bright digital billboards becoming visible
approaching and stopping at traffic light at pedestrian crosswalk intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching commercial intersection, slowing down for traffic light and crosswalk markings on the wet road

notable_agents.action: red car stopped at the intersection ahead, waiting for traffic light

entered.detail: large illuminated digital advertisement screen on the left side of the street
yellow and white striped pedestrian crosswalk lines on the road surface
multi-story commercial buildings with illuminated windows and signage
traffic signal suspended over the intersection showing red light

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from the industrial zone into a commercial area, approaching a major intersection. Large digital billboards illuminate the scene with colorful advertisements. The car slows down at a crosswalk with traffic lights, stopping behind a red vehicle while rain continues to fall on the reflective street surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal boulevard with palm trees and waterfront views

events.description: entering coastal boulevard area with palm trees visible along the left side of the road
navigating gentle curve in the road following the coastline

agents.ego_description: cruising along coastal boulevard with palm trees lining the left side, wet reflective road surface showing sky reflections

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the boulevard, reflecting in the wet road
concrete barrier separating the road from the waterfront area
massive digital screen structure spanning across the road ahead
covered bus shelter with seating on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The drive continues onto a wide coastal boulevard where palm trees line the left side against a dark rainy sky. The wet asphalt creates mirror-like reflections of the surroundings. The vehicle passes a bus stop and approaches a large overhead digital billboard structure while maintaining a gentle curve along the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with heavy neon signage

events.description: re-entering dense commercial area with bright neon signs and storefronts on both sides
navigating through heavier traffic and multiple intersections with crosswalks

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense commercial district with bright neon signs, moderate traffic, and pedestrians on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: pedestrians with umbrellas walking along the sidewalk past neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: commercial buildings covered in bright pink and blue neon signs and advertisements
ground-level shops with illuminated signs and glass windows
tall street lamps with blue and yellow painted poles lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dense commercial district characterized by overwhelming neon signage in pink, blue, and yellow hues. Multi-story buildings on both sides display bright advertisements, while pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the sidewalks. The car navigates through moderate traffic, passing various storefronts and street lights as the rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban corridor beneath elevated highway with concrete pillars

events.description: entering darker area beneath elevated highway structure, lighting becomes predominantly artificial
driving through tunnel-like space under concrete overpasses with support pillars

agents.ego_description: driving under elevated highway structure through darker tunnel-like corridor with concrete pillars

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead navigating through the underpass corridor

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning across the road overhead
thick concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway above
artificial lighting fixtures mounted on the underpass ceiling
solid concrete barriers along the right edge of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place beneath an elevated highway structure, creating a tunnel-like atmosphere with reduced natural light. Massive concrete support pillars line the left side while the vehicle travels under the overpass. Artificial lighting illuminates the corridor as the car follows another vehicle through this covered urban passage, partially sheltered from the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective that transitions from a bleak industrial district into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial hub and finally along a rainy coastal boulevard. It begins on a narrow asphalt road lined with chain link fences and industrial buildings, following another vehicle under an overhead walkway bridge as rain streaks across the windshield. As the vehicle leaves the industrial zone, the scene opens into a commercial area where the gray atmosphere is replaced by the colorful glow of large digital billboards at a busy intersection. The drive then shifts toward the waterfront, moving past a bus stop and under a massive overhead digital structure while palm trees line the road. Finally, the camera follows a gentle curve along the coast, where the heavy rain transforms the wet asphalt into a mirror-like surface reflecting the dark sky and city lights.

The shot follows a continuous drive from a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district into the shadowed enclosure of an elevated highway. It begins by navigating through a dense urban corridor where overwhelming pink, blue, and yellow advertisements illuminate the rainy streets and pedestrians with umbrellas. As the vehicle pushes through moderate traffic past glowing storefronts, the open city skyline gradually gives way to a more oppressive architectural scale. The scene then shifts beneath a massive concrete overpass, transitioning from the bright chaos of the district to a tunnel-like atmosphere defined by heavy support pillars and artificial corridor lighting. Finally, the camera follows another vehicle through this sheltered urban passage, moving deeper into the dim, industrial gloom of the highway structure.
